note: Q asks if signal is ALWAYS allowed outside town; per ПДР 9.6 a signal is allowed there, but prohibited where sign 3.33 «Подачу звукового сигналу заборонено» is set, so it is NOT always — correct option is 'Заборонено, якщо встановлений знак...' = our option 2. Confirmed by green-way, pdrtest summaries and rule 9.6.
